summary: The diff implements REQ-40 by redesigning the Navbar brand lockup in frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx. The implementation addresses all acceptance criteria: single-line display with whitespace-nowrap, bold/tracked uppercase typography using a condensed font, vertical alignment via flex/items-center, colour contrast between 'RK' (vivid blue) and 'INDUSTRIAL PARK' (white), and a flex-shrink-0 container to prevent overflow. The changes are confined to Navbar.tsx as required.
